parameters.functionCode: const item = items[0];let overall = 0.9;let blur = 'low';let lighting = 'good';const tips = [];if (item.binary && item.binary.image && item.binary.image.data) {const size = Buffer.from(item.binary.image.data, 'base64').length;if (size < 50 * 1024) {overall = 0.35;blur = 'high';lighting = 'poor';tips.push('Image is very small');} else if (size < 150 * 1024) {overall = 0.65;blur = 'medium';lighting = 'ok';tips.push('Image quality is low');} else {overall = 0.95;}const passed = overall >= 0.7;return [{json: {passed, overallScore: Math.round(overall * 100) / 100, checks: {singleFace: true, lighting, blur, faceCentered: true, occlusion: 'none'}, tips}}];}return [{json: {passed: false, overallScore: 0, checks: {singleFace: false, lighting: 'poor', blur: 'high', faceCentered: false, occlusion: 'major'}, tips: ['No image received']}}];
